The '''Laerdocians''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] who spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] with an unusual accent (pronouncing "nothing" as "nothjing", for example.) A Laerdocian named [[Bodwae]] served under the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Booster Terrik]] as a technician on the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' circa [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion]]'', a supplement to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', mentions a [[Laerdocia system/Legends|Laerdocia system]]. This may be the Laerdocian home system.<ref name="TEAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>
